proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Welch t-test: mean `dependency_BRAF` was -0.805 in `feature_009 == 1` lines (n=5574) versus -0.250 in `feature_009 == 0` lines (n=44426).
Welch t-test: mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.601 in `feature_022 == 1` lines (n=3880) versus -0.252 in `feature_022 == 0` lines (n=46120).
Welch t-test: mean `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.686 in `feature_024 == 1` lines (n=4890) versus -0.253 in `feature_024 == 0` lines (n=45110).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Welch t-test: mean `dependency_KRAS` was -0.559 in `feature_014 == 1` lines (n=11842) versus -0.252 in `feature_014 == 0` lines (n=38158).
Welch t-test: mean `dependency_RIT1` was -0.353 in `feature_027 == 1` lines (n=4560) versus -0.257 in `feature_027 == 0` lines (n=45440).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile subgroup comparison: mean `dependency_POLR2A` was -0.497 for `feature_016 >= 0.964` (n=12577) versus -0.393 otherwise (n=37423). A continuous Pearson screen gave an effect of -0.061 per SD increase in `feature_016` (p underflowed to 0).
Top-quartile subgroup comparison: mean `dependency_TMED10` was -0.282 for `feature_016 >= 0.964` versus -0.245 otherwise.
Top-quartile subgroup comparison: mean `dependency_DHX9` was -0.361 for `feature_016 >= 0.964` versus -0.324 otherwise.
Welch t-test: mean `dependency_RPL11` was -0.361 in `feature_018 == 1` lines (n=8055) versus -0.252 in `feature_018 == 0` lines (n=41945).
Welch t-test: mean `dependency_RPL11` was -0.344 for `feature_003 >= 0.428` (n=12501) versus -0.245 otherwise (n=37499).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == "colorectal"` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Lineage comparison: mean `dependency_KIF18A` was -0.720 in `feature_011 == "colorectal"` lines (n=5816) versus -0.252 in other lines (n=44184).
Binary-feature comparison: mean `dependency_KIF18A` was -0.545 in `feature_035 == 1` lines (n=9285) versus -0.253 in `feature_035 == 0` lines (n=40715).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_KIF18A` effect is concentrated in the double-positive subgroup `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1`, which has more negative scores than all other lines.
Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` cell lines, `feature_020 == 1` suppresses KIF18A dependency, making `dependency_KIF18A` less negative than in `feature_020 == 0` lines.

Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` cell lines, high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) enables stronger KIF18A dependency, making `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than in lower-`feature_028` lines.

analyses.result_summary: The double-positive subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.943 (n=3925) versus -0.253 for all other lines (n=46075). The `feature_011 == "colorectal"` by `feature_035 == 1` interaction coefficient was -0.682 (p underflowed to 0).

Inside the colorectal/`feature_035 == 1` subgroup, `feature_020 == 1` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.252 (n=699) versus -1.092 for `feature_020 == 0` (n=3226), so the signed suppressor effect was positive.
Inside the colorectal/`feature_035 == 1` subgroup, `feature_028 >= 0.819` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.112 (n=3133) versus -0.273 for lower `feature_028` (n=792).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest KIF18A dependency occurs specifically in cell lines satisfying all four predicates: `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819`.

analyses.result_summary: Complete-subgroup test: the four-predicate subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.299 (n=2571) versus -0.253 in all other lines (n=47429).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `feature_009 == 1` BRAF dependency effect is further strengthened in `feature_011 == "skin"` lines compared with non-skin lines.
Among `feature_022 == 1` lines, high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) further strengthens EGFR dependency.
Among `feature_024 == 1` lines, `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` further strengthens ERBB2 dependency.
Among `feature_014 == 1` lines, `feature_011 == "pancreatic"` further strengthens KRAS dependency.
Among `feature_014 == 1` lines, `feature_011 == "colorectal"` further strengthens KRAS dependency.
Among `feature_027 == 1` lines, `feature_011 == "brain"` further strengthens RIT1 dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic driver-by-modifier interaction screen for BRAF found no meaningful skin amplification: the `feature_009 == 1` by skin interaction coefficient was -0.0126, with skin/driver mean -0.811 versus non-skin/driver mean -0.801.
Systematic EGFR heterogeneity screen: the `feature_022 == 1` by high-`feature_023` interaction coefficient was -0.0299; double-positive lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.624 (n=940).

Systematic ERBB2 heterogeneity screen: the `feature_024 == 1` by `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` interaction coefficient was -0.0671; double-positive lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.753 (n=142).
Systematic KRAS heterogeneity screen did not support pancreatic amplification: the `feature_014 == 1` by pancreatic interaction coefficient was -0.0028.

Systematic KRAS heterogeneity screen did not support colorectal amplification: the `feature_014 == 1` by colorectal interaction coefficient was +0.0054, opposite the hypothesized strengthening direction.

Systematic RIT1 heterogeneity screen supported brain amplification: the `feature_027 == 1` by brain interaction coefficient was -0.0582; double-positive lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.405 (n=329).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`), `feature_011 == "prostate"` further strengthens TMED10 dependency.
Among lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`), `feature_027 == 1` further strengthens DHX9 dependency.
Among lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`), `feature_027 == 0` further strengthens POLR2A dependency.
Among lines with `feature_018 == 1`, high `feature_031` (`feature_031 >= 0.654`) further strengthens RPL11 dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic TMED10 heterogeneity screen found only a borderline prostate modifier: interaction coefficient -0.0309, double-positive mean -0.307 (n=621), not significant at 0.05.
Systematic DHX9 heterogeneity screen supported `feature_027 == 1` as a modifier of high `feature_016`: interaction coefficient -0.0323, double-positive mean -0.386 (n=1156).
Systematic POLR2A heterogeneity screen supported `feature_027 == 0` as a modifier of high `feature_016`: interaction coefficient -0.0359, double-positive mean -0.500 (n=11421).
Systematic RPL11 heterogeneity screen supported high `feature_031` as a modifier of `feature_018 == 1`: interaction coefficient -0.0352, double-positive mean -0.386 (n=1973).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final BRAF subgroup: `feature_009 == 1` cell lines have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other lines.
Final EGFR subgroup: `feature_022 == 1` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` cell lines have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other lines.
Final ERBB2 subgroup: `feature_024 == 1` and `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` cell lines have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other lines.
Final KRAS subgroup: `feature_014 == 1` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other lines, without requiring pancreatic or colorectal lineage.
Final RIT1 subgroup: `feature_027 == 1` and `feature_011 == "brain"` cell lines have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other lines.
Final KIF18A subgroup: `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other lines.
Final TMED10 subgroup: high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) cell lines have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other lines.
Final DHX9 subgroup: `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_027 == 1` cell lines have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other lines.
Final POLR2A subgroup: `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_027 == 0` cell lines have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other lines.
Final RPL11 subgroup: `feature_018 == 1` and `feature_031 >= 0.654` cell lines have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other lines.

analyses.result_summary: Final subgroup test: `feature_009 == 1` BRAF subgroup mean -0.805 (n=5574) versus -0.250 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: EGFR subgroup mean -0.624 (n=940) versus -0.273 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: ERBB2 subgroup mean -0.753 (n=142) versus -0.294 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: `feature_014 == 1` KRAS subgroup mean -0.559 (n=11842) versus -0.252 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: RIT1 brain/`feature_027 == 1` subgroup mean -0.405 (n=329) versus -0.265 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: four-predicate KIF18A subgroup mean -1.299 (n=2571) versus -0.253 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: high-`feature_016` TMED10 subgroup mean -0.282 (n=12577) versus -0.245 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: DHX9 high-`feature_016`/`feature_027 == 1` subgroup mean -0.386 (n=1156) versus -0.332 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: POLR2A high-`feature_016`/`feature_027 == 0` subgroup mean -0.500 (n=11421) versus -0.395 otherwise.
Final subgroup test: RPL11 `feature_018 == 1`/high-`feature_031` subgroup mean -0.386 (n=1973) versus -0.265 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After accounting for all lower-order terms among `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819`, the four-way interaction remains negative for `dependency_KIF18A`.
After controlling for high `feature_003` and high `feature_016`, the `feature_018 == 1` by high `feature_031` interaction remains negative for `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.result_summary: Full factorial OLS over the four KIF18A predicates retained a negative four-way interaction coefficient of -0.942 on `dependency_KIF18A` beyond all lower-order terms.
analyses.code: OLS dependency_KIF18A ~ colorectal * feature_035_1 * feature_020_0 * feature_028_Q75

analyses.result_summary: OLS model for `dependency_RPL11` including `feature_018 == 1`, high `feature_031`, high `feature_003`, high `feature_016`, and the `feature_018` by high-`feature_031` interaction retained a negative interaction coefficient of -0.0357.
analyses.code: OLS dependency_RPL11 ~ feature_018_1 + feature_031_Q75 + feature_003_Q75 + feature_016_Q75 + feature_018_1:feature_031_Q75
